sentences.english: First impressions are really important, I think.
You only get one chance to make a good one.
sentences.korean: 좋은 첫인상을 만들 기회는 한 번뿐이에요.

sentences.english: I try not to judge people by their first impression.
Some people are just shy at first but really cool once you get to know them.
sentences.korean: 처음에 수줍어하지만 알고 보면 정말 멋진 사람도 있거든요.

sentences.english: Honestly, I form opinions about people within the first five seconds.
sentences.korean: 솔직히 처음 5초 안에 사람에 대한 의견이 생겨요.

sentences.english: It's not fair, but it happens automatically.

quiz.question: What is the main topic of this passage?
